ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team owner */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number for the team */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the team's headquarters */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URLs of the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the owner within the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the driver belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "driver_license" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of racing experience */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URLs of the driver's social media profiles */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the event is held */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., qualifying, race) */,
  "race_distance" INTEGER /* Total distance of the race in kilometers */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "spectator_count" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_events_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the track in meters */,
  "number_of_turns" INTEGER /* Number of turns in the track */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of the track (e.g., oval, road course) */,
  "elevation_changes" TEXT /* Elevation changes on the track */,
  "surface_material" TEXT /* Material of the track surface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing event */,
  "tot_pts" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "race_pts" INTEGER /* Points earned by the team in the racing event */,
  "bns_pts" INTEGER /* Bonus points earned by the team */,
  "pen_pts" INTEGER /* Penalty points incurred by the team */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the team */,
  "laps_led" INTEGER /* Number of laps led by the team */,
  "inc" INTEGER /* Number of incidents involving the team */,
  "fastest_lap" INTEGER /* Fastest lap time in seconds */,
  "average_speed" INTEGER /* Average speed of the team during the event */,
  "pit_stops" INTEGER /* Number of pit stops made by the team */,
  "fuel_strategy" TEXT /* Fuel strategy used by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_events" INTEGER /* Total number of events in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "champion_driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver that won the championship */,
  "total_spectator_count" INTEGER /* Total number of spectators across all events in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing season */,
  "tot_pts" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team in the season */,
  "race_pts" INTEGER /* Points earned by the team in racing events during the season */,
  "bns_pts" INTEGER /* Bonus points earned by the team in the season */,
  "pen_pts" INTEGER /* Penalty points incurred by the team in the season */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the team in the season */,
  "laps_led" INTEGER /* Number of laps led by the team in the season */,
  "inc" INTEGER /* Number of incidents involving the team in the season */,
  "fastest_lap" INTEGER /* Fastest lap time in seconds across the season */,
  "average_speed" INTEGER /* Average speed of the team during the season */,
  "pit_stops" INTEGER /* Total number of pit stops made by the team in the season */,
  "fuel_strategy" TEXT /* Fuel strategy used by the team during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
